falsification_conditions.condition: Price breaks above the 200-day moving average by ≥12.5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Confirms a bullish trend reversal, invalidating the 'HOLD' signal and 'bottom' pattern assumption

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to ≥60 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Indicates a confirmed blowoff top scenario, contradicting the 'bottom_2024_aug' pattern match and current HOLD signal

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume surges to ≥150% of 30-day average volume within 7 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Suggests extreme market participation invalidating the 'UNKNOWN' phase assumption and indicating a breakout

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
